standardization_notes: Section headings follow JIS Z 7253:2019. Section 1 uses '化学品及び会社情報' (JIS Z 7253:2019); older source documents that use '製品及び会社情報' are normalised automatically.
warnings: [HIGH][S2-GHS-INCOMPLETE] Section 2: HazardStatement present but HazardPictogram is empty — GHS labelling incomplete.
[MED][S9-VALUE-WITHOUT-UNIT] Section 9: numeric physical property value present without a Unit — add unit (e.g. "°C", "kPa", "g/cm³").
